1. Year (1973-2024)

The data appears to be annual with one row per year. This will be suitable for deflating our nominal series.

5. Then proceed with the full analysis",

import pandas as pd
import openpyxl

# Examine ERP-2025-table10.xls structure

for sheet in pd.ExcelFile('ERP-2025-table10.xls').sheet_names:
    print(sheet)
    df = pd.read_excel('ERP-2025-table10.xls', sheet_name=sheet)
    print(df.head(10))
    print('---')

EOF
